metadata.author: Juan Antonio Breña Moral
metadata.description: Use when you need to generate Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for a Java project through an interactive, conversational process that systematically gathers context, stakeholders, options, and outcomes to produce well-structured ADR documents.

prompt.title: Java ADR Generator with interactive conversational approach
prompt.goal:
Generate Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for Java projects through an interactive, conversational process that systematically gathers all necessary context to produce well-structured ADR documents. **This is an interactive SKILL**.
**What is covered in this Skill?**
- ADR file storage configuration - Conversational information gathering: context, stakeholders, decision drivers, options with pros/cons, outcome, consequences - MADR template generation - Validation with `./mvnw validate` or `mvn validate` before proceeding

constraints.constraints-description: Before applying any ADR generation, ensure the project validates. If validation fails, stop immediately — do not proceed until all validation errors are resolved.

constraint-list.constraint: **MANDATORY**: Run `./mvnw validate` or `mvn validate` before applying any ADR generation
**SAFETY**: If validation fails, stop immediately — do not proceed until all validation errors are resolved
**BEFORE APPLYING**: Read the reference for detailed good/bad examples, constraints, and safeguards for each ADR generation pattern

step.step-content: Run `./mvnw validate` or `mvn validate` before starting ADR generation.

step-constraint-list.step-constraint: If validation fails, stop and ask to resolve errors first

step.step-title: Read ADR reference and gather context
step.step-content: Read `references/030-architecture-adr-general.md`, then collect context, stakeholders, decision drivers, options, and trade-offs through conversation.
Summarize recommended option, rationale, and consequences, and confirm alignment with the user before creating the ADR artifact.
Create a MADR-style ADR document with the final decision, alternatives, consequences, and follow-up actions.
